description: Externalized datacleaner asset-adjuster materiality / review gate thresholds (TDB-5). Values here are byte-equal to the pre-TDB-5 in-code constants, so loading this file changes nothing. An ABSENT file OR an ABSENT key falls back to the in-code default (DefaultAssetThresholds), so production behaviour stays byte-identical until an operator deliberately edits a value. Every ratio must be in (0, 1]. Industry-keyed B-rule tables (A5/B1/B2/B3) and treatment rates (A4 50% / A5 40% / A2 tiers / C1 1.5%) are intentionally NOT externalized in this cut — see docs/refactoring/spec/tdb-5-adjustment-thresholds-config-spec.md sections 3.2 and 3.3.
